metadata.description: Marketplace hosting Timestamped, the topic-first YouTube newsletter generator.

plugins.name: timestamped
plugins.description: Timestamped — topic-first YouTube newsletter generator: velocity-ranks the best videos on a topic from the last 30 days, transcribes them via yt2md, and writes a newsletter where every claim is cited to the second and the big claims are corroborated (Markdown + HTML with a chart + PDF). Optionally follows a standing channel list. Any language.
